items.bullet: U-M/LANL facility on 144 tax-exempt acres faces township opposition while 12-month water moratorium remains in effect after prior unanimous votes.
Augusta Planning Commission discusses draft rules requiring 10-acre lots and 400-ft setbacks for data centers over 10 MW or 100 gpm water use.
Wixom Industrial One proposes three data center buildings over 500,000 square feet at 30625 Wixom Road as council weighs ordinance and moratorium lift.
Ypsilanti Township sought 12-month water moratorium for data centers citing up to 5M gallons daily demand on 144-acre UMich-Los Alamos site.
